description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in openMairie openCourrier 2.02 and 2.03 beta, when register_globals is enabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the path_om parameter to (1) bible.class.php, (2) dossier.class.php, (3) service.class.php, (4) collectivite.class.php, (5) droit.class.php, (6) tache.class.php, (7) emetteur.class.php, (8) utilisateur.class.php, (9) courrier.recherche.tab.class.php, and (10) profil.class.php in obj/.  NOTE: some of these details are obtained from third party information.
